user.description: Set required parameters to connect to your router

data_description.username: This is always 'root' by default on GL-iNet devices
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your GL-iNet router.
data_description.password: The password you use to login to your router's admin page, this is unlikely to be the same as your WiFi password
data_description.consider_home: Seconds to wait before deciding that a device is away

data_description.username: This is always 'root' by default on GL-iNet devices
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your GL-iNet router.
data_description.password: The password you use to login to your router's admin page, this is unlikely to be the same as your WiFi password
data_description.consider_home: Seconds to wait before deciding that a device is away

repeater_connect.name: Repeater: connect to Wi-Fi
repeater_connect.description: Adds or joins an upstream Wi-Fi network using the router repeater / client (STA) path. May briefly interrupt connectivity.

config_entry.name: Router
config_entry.description: The GL-iNet integration entry to use.

ssid.name: SSID
ssid.description: Name of the Wi-Fi network to join.

password.name: Wi-Fi password
password.description: Passphrase for the uplink network. Store secrets in Home Assistant secrets, not in plain text automations.

remember.name: Save network
remember.description: When true, the profile is saved on the router (typical GL.iNet 4.x behavior).

manual.name: Manual setup
manual.description: Passed through to the router connect RPC (default false).

bssid.name: BSSID
bssid.description: Optional MAC of the specific access point to lock onto.

extra.name: Extra RPC fields
extra.description: Optional object merged into the router connect payload for firmware-specific options.

repeater_scan.name: Repeater: scan for networks
repeater_scan.description: Runs an uplink Wi-Fi scan. Use a response variable when calling to capture results.

config_entry.name: Router
config_entry.description: The GL-iNet integration entry to use.

band.name: Band hint
band.description: Optional hint passed to the router (e.g. radio or band key supported by your firmware).

repeater_disconnect.name: Repeater: disconnect uplink
repeater_disconnect.description: Disconnects the current repeater / STA uplink session.

config_entry.name: Router
config_entry.description: The GL-iNet integration entry to use.

repeater_get_saved_ap_list.name: Repeater: list saved uplink networks
repeater_get_saved_ap_list.description: Returns saved uplink profiles from the router. Passphrases are redacted.

config_entry.name: Router
config_entry.description: The GL-iNet integration entry to use.
